revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23125537382|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Armed_forces%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Armed_forces%2Fdoc for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Place categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata --> {{Redirects|Template:Military|the WikiProject template|Template:WikiProject Military history|the infobox|Template:Infobox national military|the navbox|Template:Military and war}} {{shortcut|Military|template=1}} Examples: {{nowiki template demo|format=inline|output=nowiki+|code=<nowiki>{{armed forces|United States}}</nowiki>}} {{nowiki template demo|format=inline|output=nowiki+|code=<nowiki>{{armed forces|USA}}</nowiki>}}
Multiple uses of this template can increase the [[Wikipedia:Post-expand include size|Post-expand include size]] of the page. The following alternative can be used instead:
* {{tlx|armed forces|USA}} → {{armed forces|USA}} (426b) * {{mlx|1=flagg|2=main|3=usl|4=avar=military|5=USA}} → {{#invoke:flagg|main|usl|avar=military|USA}} (287b) <includeonly>{{sandbox other|| <!-- Categories below this line and interwikis at Wikidata -->
}}</includeonly>
<noinclude> [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Flag template system]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
